title: Better Copper
description: Have you ever thought about how boring the texture of copper stuff is? This resource pack solves that problem!
body:
[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/X7tAYb08?style=for-the-badge&label=DOWNLOADS&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/project/X7tAYb08)  [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1428448?style=for-the-badge&label=DOWNLOADS&logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-copper)

## Improves the look of copper items by giving them a more detailed and cooler texture style that fits modern Minecraft visuals.

![Changed textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3bde8959acd04d608605432bfe1bd567831a9b6.png)

### Changed textures:
- All copper items, such as Copper Sword, Copper Pickaxe, Copper Spear (1.21.11+), etc.
- Copper Armor

### In progress:
- Copper Nautilus Armor
- Copper Horse Armor

<details>
<summary>How to set up</summary>
  
In the game go to **Options > Resource packs > Open folder**. Put the downloaded pack into the opening folder. After it shows up on the left side in the game window, **click on the arrow** to move it to the right side, then click on **Done**.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

Spear texture: [SzabAndris1001](https://modrinth.com/user/SzabAndris1001)

Other textures: [Many More Ores and Crafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/many-more-ores-and-crafts) (I recommend it, it's a really cool mod!)

</details>
